title: Terebraria apiculata

It is classified within the phylum Mollusca, class Gastropoda, and infraclass Caenogastropoda. The Terebridae family is part of the superfamily Clypeoidea and is closely related to other families such as the family Sterrhydidae. The classification of Terebraria apiculata reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary relationships with other gastropod mollusks.
